description: A partnership with two partners needs its annual income tax return prepared.

nodes.task_description: Input the partnership's income and expenses from its financial statements.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly enters all financial data onto Form 1065.

nodes.task_description: Allocate the net income and other tax items to the partners based on the partnership agreement.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly allocates all items according to the partners' ownership percentages.

nodes.task_description: Prepare Schedule K-1 for each partner.

expected_outcome.value: Agent generates an accurate Schedule K-1 for both partners to use on their personal returns.
